issues.finding:
result = subprocess.run(
                    [sys.executable, str(test_script)],
                    capture_output=True,
                    text=True,
                    timeout=60
issues.explanation: subprocess module calls execute external commands. Without careful input validation, this enables command injection.
issues.remediation: Use subprocess.run() with shell=False and an explicit argument list. Validate all inputs and avoid passing user-controlled data to commands.

            try:
                result = subprocess.run(
                    [sys.executable, str(test_script)],
                    capture_output=True,
                    text=True,

issues.explanation: Without declared permissions the skill's intent is opaque and cannot be validated.
issues.remediation: Add a 'permissions' field to SKILL.md listing the capabilities this skill requires.
